title: rubus moschus
intro: Rubus moschus, also known as the musk raspberry or wolfberry, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus moschus include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus moschus is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in capsules or tablets as a dietary supplement.
